items.claim: Magomed Ankalaev is the overall better striker and a far better kickboxer.
items.quote: Should be a mostly striking match-up, and he's just the overall better striker. He's a far better kickboxer.

items.claim: Magomed Ankalaev has seemingly solid takedown defense.
items.quote: The takedown defense is seemingly solid.

items.claim: Axel Sola showed great cardio in his previous fight and never stopped moving.
items.quote: He never stopped moving. The cardio looked great.

items.claim: Magomed Ankalaev was knocked out by Alex Pereira during Ramadan while coming off an injury.
items.quote: During Ramadan, coming off an injury.

items.claim: Alex Pereira is the hardest hitter the light heavyweight division has ever seen.
items.quote: That's Alex Pereira. The hardest hitter that division has ever seen.

items.claim: Magomed Ankalaev is ten times the fighter that Guskov is.
items.quote: I think Ankalaev kind of runs through Guskov here. I think he's 10 times the fighter.
